title: CDSCO Flags 27 Drug Batches Including Paracetamol, Ibuprofen, Levetiracetam as Not of Standard Quality
summary: New Delhi: In a fresh drug quality alert highlighting continued regulatory surveillance, 27 batches of drugs and one medical device have been declared Not of Standard Quality (NSQ) by laboratories...
thbAction: Position THB's pharma CRM and omnichannel HCP engagement workflows to support launch planning, KAM orchestration, and compliant follow-up across India and the Middle East.
